title: Subsequent elections
doc_html:
§4496.  Subsequent elections

The propositions may be re-submitted at any time at a special or a general election provided that not more than one special election as provided for in this Sub-part is held within any period of twelve months.
doc_text:
§4496.  Subsequent elections
The propositions may be re-submitted at any time at a special or a general election provided that not more than one special election as provided for in this Sub-part is held within any period of twelve months.
